'''âm-r-r''' ('''marara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lookit|lookit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lookit|lookit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| marara
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mararithi|mararithi]] || [[word:marariji|marariji]] || [[word:mararishi|mararishi]] || [[word:marari|marari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararuthuth|mararuthuth]] || [[word:mararujuj|mararujuj]] || [[word:mararushush|mararushush]] || [[word:marar|marar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mararuthu|mararuthu]] || [[word:mararuju|mararuju]] || [[word:mararushu|mararushu]] || [[word:mararu|mararu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mararufuth|mararufuth]] || [[word:mararufuj|mararufuj]] || [[word:mararufush|mararufush]] || [[word:mararuf|mararuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mararethe|mararethe]] || [[word:marareje|marareje]] || [[word:marareshe|marareshe]] || [[word:marare|marare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararothoth|mararothoth]] || [[word:mararojoj|mararojoj]] || [[word:mararoshosh|mararoshosh]] || [[word:marar|marar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mararotho|mararotho]] || [[word:mararojo|mararojo]] || [[word:mararosho|mararosho]] || [[word:mararo|mararo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mararofoth|mararofoth]] || [[word:mararofoj|mararofoj]] || [[word:mararofosh|mararofosh]] || [[word:mararof|mararof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararĂŻfĂŻf|mararĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻfĂŻf|mararĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻfĂŻf|mararĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻfĂŻf|mararĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]] || [[word:mararĂŻf|mararĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mararĂŠthĂŠ|mararĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mararĂŠjĂŠ|mararĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mararĂŠshĂŠ|mararĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mararĂŠ|mararĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararathath|mararathath]] || [[word:mararajaj|mararajaj]] || [[word:mararashash|mararashash]] || [[word:marar|marar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mararatha|mararatha]] || [[word:mararaja|mararaja]] || [[word:mararasha|mararasha]] || [[word:marara|marara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mararafath|mararafath]] || [[word:mararafaj|mararafaj]] || [[word:mararafash|mararafash]] || [[word:mararaf|mararaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mararasha|mararasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomararasha|gomararasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimararasha|gokimararasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mararnĂŒasha|mararnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomararnknĂŒasha|gomararnknĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimararnĂŒasha|gokimararnĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mararshĂ«asha|mararshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomararnkshĂ«asha|gomararnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimararshĂ«asha|gokimararshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mararroasha|mararroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomararnkroasha|gomararnkroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimararroasha|gokimararroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mararmuasha|mararmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomararnkmuasha|gomararnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimararmuasha|gokimararmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mararsherasha|mararsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomararnksherasha|gomararnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimararsherasha|gokimararsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mararngasha|mararngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomararnkngasha|gomararnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimararngasha|gokimararngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mararyaasha|mararyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomararnkyaasha|gomararnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimararyaasha|gokimararyaasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mararyamasha|mararyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomararnkyamasha|gomararnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimararyamasha|gokimararyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mararnĂŒshĂ«asha|mararnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomararnknĂŒshĂ«asha|gomararnknĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimararnĂŒshĂ«asha|gokimararnĂŒshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mararnĂŒroasha|mararnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomararnknĂŒroasha|gomararnknĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimararnĂŒroasha|gokimararnĂŒroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mararnĂŒmuasha|mararnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomararnknĂŒmuasha|gomararnknĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimararnĂŒmuasha|gokimararnĂŒmuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mararshĂ«nĂŒasha|mararshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomararnkshĂ«nĂŒasha|gomararnkshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimararshĂ«nĂŒasha|gokimararshĂ«nĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mararshĂ«roasha|mararshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomararnkshĂ«roasha|gomararnkshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimararshĂ«roasha|gokimararshĂ«roasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mararshĂ«muasha|mararshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomararnkshĂ«muasha|gomararnkshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimararshĂ«muasha|gokimararshĂ«muasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mararronĂŒasha|mararronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomararnkronĂŒasha|gomararnkronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimararronĂŒasha|gokimararronĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mararroshĂ«asha|mararroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomararnkroshĂ«asha|gomararnkroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimararroshĂ«asha|gokimararroshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mararromuasha|mararromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomararnkromuasha|gomararnkromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimararromuasha|gokimararromuasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mararmunĂŒasha|mararmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomararnkmunĂŒasha|gomararnkmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimararmunĂŒasha|gokimararmunĂŒasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mararmushĂ«asha|mararmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomararnkmushĂ«asha|gomararnkmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimararmushĂ«asha|gokimararmushĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mararmuroasha|mararmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomararnkmuroasha|gomararnkmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimararmuroasha|gokimararmuroasha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:marar|marar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠrĂŠr|mĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homarar|homarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠrĂŠr|homĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomarar|hohomarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠrĂŠr|hohomĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmarar|nĂŒmarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠrĂŠr|nĂŒmĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmarar|nĂŒnĂŒmarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠrĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmarar|nĂŻmarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠrĂŠr|nĂŻmĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmarar|nĂŻnĂŻmarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠrĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumarar|lumarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠrĂŠr|lumĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumarar|lulumarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠrĂŠr|lulumĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limarar|limarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠrĂŠr|limĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimarar|lilimarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠrĂŠr|lilimĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komarar|komarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠrĂŠr|komĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomarar|kokomarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠrĂŠr|kokomĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemarar|kemarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠrĂŠr|kemĂŠrĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemarar|kekemarar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠrĂŠr|kekemĂŠrĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
